## Type of Change

## Structure Checklist
- [ ] CRD types include required printcolumns (Ready/Reason/Message/Age + specific columns)
- [ ] Controller follows standard reconcile flow and uses `setErrorStatus`
- [ ] Docs added/updated in `docs/crds/`
- [ ] `make generate manifests` run and committed
- [ ] `make verify` run

- [ ] `make test-e2e` (if applicable)
